Bash(python3 -c "
import re, sys

errors = []

# index.html — JS 로드 순서 확인
with open\('index.html'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)
    scripts = re.findall\(r'src=\\"js/\(\\w+\\.js\)\\"', html\)
    print\('JS 로드 순서:', scripts\)

# 각 JS 파일 window 전역 등록 확인
js_files = {
    'js/stages.js':       'window.STAGES',
    'js/utils.js':        'window.Utils',
    'js/AudioEngine.js':  'window.AudioEngine',
    'js/SinkholeEffect.js': 'window.SinkholeEffect',
    'js/ScoreTracker.js': 'window.ScoreTracker',
    'js/StageManager.js': 'window.StageManager',
}

for path, symbol in js_files.items\(\):
    with open\(path\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    if symbol in content:
        print\(f'  ✅ {path}: {symbol} 등록 확인'\)
    else:
        errors.append\(f'  ❌ {path}: {symbol} 미등록'\)

# CSS 파일 존재 확인
css_files = ['css/reset.css','css/variables.css','css/layout.css','css/animations.css','css/components.css']
for c in css_files:
    size = len\(open\(c\).read\(\)\)
    print\(f'  ✅ {c}: {size} bytes'\)

# display:none 금지 확인
for c in css_files:
    with open\(c\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    matches = re.findall\(r'display\\s*:\\s*none\(?!\\s*/\)', content\)
    if matches:
        errors.append\(f'  ❌ {c}: display:none 발견 \({len\(matches\)}건\)'\)

if errors:
    print\(\)
    print\('=== 오류 ==='\)
    for e in errors: print\(e\)
else:
    print\(\)
    print\('✅ 전체 점검 통과'\)
")

import re

with open\('/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/css/layout.css'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# 주석 제거 후 display:none 검색
no_comments = re.sub\(r'/\\*.*?\\*/', '', content, flags=re.DOTALL\)
matches = re.findall\(r'display\\s*:\\s*none', no_comments\)
print\(f'주석 제거 후 display:none 건수: {len\(matches\)}'\)

# icon-play / icon-pause style=display:none 확인 \(HTML에서\)
with open\('/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/index.html'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)
display_none_html = re.findall\(r'style=\\"[^\\"]*display:none[^\\"]*\\"', html\)
print\(f'index.html inline display:none: {display_none_html}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import re

errors = []

# CSS display:none 주석 제외 검사
for f in ['css/reset.css','css/variables.css','css/layout.css','css/animations.css','css/components.css']:
    with open\(f'/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/{f}'\) as fp:
        c = re.sub\(r'/\\*.*?\\*/', '', fp.read\(\), flags=re.DOTALL\)
    m = re.findall\(r'display\\s*:\\s*none', c\)
    if m: errors.append\(f'{f}: display:none {len\(m\)}건'\)

# HTML inline display:none 검사
with open\('/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/index.html'\) as f:
    html = f.read\(\)
m = re.findall\(r'style=\\"[^\\"]*display\\s*:\\s*none', html\)
if m: errors.append\(f'index.html: inline display:none {len\(m\)}건'\)

# JS window 등록 확인
for path, sym in [
    \('js/stages.js','window.STAGES'\),
    \('js/utils.js','window.Utils'\),
    \('js/AudioEngine.js','window.AudioEngine'\),
    \('js/SinkholeEffect.js','window.SinkholeEffect'\),
    \('js/ScoreTracker.js','window.ScoreTracker'\),
    \('js/StageManager.js','window.StageManager'\),
]:
    with open\(f'/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/{path}'\) as fp:
        if sym not in fp.read\(\):
            errors.append\(f'{path}: {sym} 미등록'\)

# QA 체크리스트
checks = [
    \('index.html', 'screen-intro',  '인트로 화면 DOM'\),
    \('index.html', 'screen-start',  '시작 화면 DOM'\),
    \('index.html', 'screen-stage',  '스테이지 화면 DOM'\),
    \('index.html', 'screen-result', '결과 화면 DOM'\),
    \('index.html', 'btn-a',         'A 선택 버튼'\),
    \('index.html', 'btn-b',         'B 선택 버튼'\),
    \('index.html', 'gauge-progress','SVG 게이지'\),
    \('js/StageManager.js', 'isProcessing', '중복 클릭 방지'\),
    \('js/StageManager.js', 'goToScreen',   '화면 전환 함수'\),
    \('js/StageManager.js', 'showResult',   '결과 화면 함수'\),
    \('js/StageManager.js', 'reset',        '재도전 초기화'\),
    \('js/AudioEngine.js',  'NotAllowedError', 'iOS 자동재생 처리'\),
    \('js/SinkholeEffect.js','prefers-reduced-motion','경량 모드'\),
]

for filename, keyword, desc in checks:
    path = f'/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/{filename}'
    with open\(path\) as fp:
        if keyword not in fp.read\(\):
            errors.append\(f'{filename}: [{desc}] 키워드 \\"{keyword}\\" 없음'\)

if errors:
    print\('=== 오류 ==='\)
    for e in errors: print\('  ❌', e\)
else:
    print\('✅ 전체 QA 점검 통과 \(display:none 0건, 전역 등록 6/6, 주요 기능 확인\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import re, os

BASE = '/Users/marko/Documents/GitHub/voicetrap-project/plan-b'
errors = []

# 파일 존재 확인
required = [
    'index.html',
    'css/reset.css','css/variables.css','css/layout.css',
    'css/animations.css','css/components.css',
    'js/menus.js','js/utils.js','js/AudioEngine.js',
    'js/HellEffect.js','js/ScoreTracker.js','js/MenuManager.js','js/main.js',
]
for f in required:
    path = f'{BASE}/{f}'
    if not os.path.exists\(path\):
        errors.append\(f'파일 없음: {f}'\)
    else:
        size = os.path.getsize\(path\)
        print\(f'  ✅ {f} \({size:,} bytes\)'\)

# display:none 검사 \(CSS\)
css_files = ['css/reset.css','css/variables.css','css/layout.css','css/animations.css','css/components.css']
for f in css_files:
    with open\(f'{BASE}/{f}'\) as fp:
        c = re.sub\(r'/\\*.*?\\*/', '', fp.read\(\), flags=re.DOTALL\)
    m = re.findall\(r'display\\s*:\\s*none', c\)
    if m: errors.append\(f'{f}: display:none {len\(m\)}건'\)

# HTML inline display:none
with open\(f'{BASE}/index.html'\) as fp:
    html = fp.read\(\)
m = re.findall\(r'style=\\"[^\\"]*display\\s*:\\s*none', html\)
if m: errors.append\(f'index.html: inline display:none {len\(m\)}건'\)

# JS 로드 순서
scripts = re.findall\(r'src=\\"js/\(\\w+\\.js\)\\"', html\)
print\(f'\\nJS 로드 순서: {scripts}'\)

# window 전역 등록
for path, sym in [
    \('js/menus.js','window.MENUS'\),
    \('js/utils.js','window.Utils'\),
    \('js/AudioEngine.js','window.AudioEngine'\),
    \('js/HellEffect.js','window.HellEffect'\),
    \('js/ScoreTracker.js','window.ScoreTracker'\),
    \('js/MenuManager.js','window.MenuManager'\),
]:
    with open\(f'{BASE}/{path}'\) as fp:
        if sym not in fp.read\(\):
            errors.append\(f'{path}: {sym} 미등록'\)

# 주요 기능 키워드
checks = [
    \('index.html','screen-intro','인트로 화면'\),
    \('index.html','screen-menu','메뉴판 화면'\),
    \('index.html','screen-menu-stage','스테이지 화면'\),
    \('index.html','screen-receipt','영수증 화면'\),
    \('js/MenuManager.js','isProcessing','중복 클릭 방지'\),
    \('js/MenuManager.js','applySpiceTheme','맛 단계 컬러 테마'\),
    \('js/MenuManager.js','showReceipt','영수증 렌더링'\),
    \('js/HellEffect.js','prefers-reduced-motion','경량 모드'\),
    \('js/HellEffect.js','triggerSurvived','통과 애니메이션'\),
    \('js/ScoreTracker.js','renderReceiptItems','영수증 항목'\),
    \('js/ScoreTracker.js','renderImmunityGauge','면역력 게이지'\),
    \('js/utils.js','createFireParticles','불꽃 파티클'\),
    \('js/utils.js','createGoldParticles','금색 파티클'\),
]
for filename, keyword, desc in checks:
    with open\(f'{BASE}/{filename}'\) as fp:
        if keyword not in fp.read\(\):
            errors.append\(f'{filename}: [{desc}] 없음'\)

print\(\)
if errors:
    print\('=== 오류 ==='\)
    for e in errors: print\('  ❌', e\)
else:
    print\('✅ B안 전체 QA 통과'\)
    print\(f'   파일 {len\(required\)}개 | display:none 0건 | 전역 등록 6/6 | 주요 기능 {len\(checks\)}개 확인'\)
")
Bash(git add plan-b/ plan-ab/ && git status --short)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Plan B \(헬스키친\) and Plan AB \(조합안\) campaign landing pages

- plan-b/: 보이스피싱 헬스키친 — 4단계 맛 단계 체험 구조
- plan-ab/: 보이스피싱크홀 헬스키친 — A안 싱크홀 비주얼 + B안 맛 단계 결합

Both use pure HTML/CSS/Vanilla JS, zero build tools, mobile-first \(480px\),
iOS Safari compliant, opacity-based screen transitions \(no display:none\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
